/usr/bin/c++  -fvisibility=hidden -Wl,-rpath,$ORIGIN:$ORIGIN/libs:./libs:/data/lxapp/aitask/libs,-disable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/test.dir/test.cpp.o -o test   -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/acllib/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/acllib/lib64:/opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/build:/opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib liblximagecmp.so -lpthread -ldl -lrt /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.3 /opt/work/nfs95/imagecmp_v2/deps/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.3 -lascendcl -lacl_dvpp -lpthread -ldl -lrt
